# mcp Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [AdjacencyList Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-graph-cache-ts-adjacencylist.html): Architecture documentation for the AdjacencyList type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [AnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/domain-analysistools.html): A suite of specific query handlers that traverse the code graph to extract architectural meaning. Architectural overview of the AnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.
- [CacheEntry Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-graph-cache-ts-cacheentry.html): Architecture documentation for the CacheEntry type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [CallGraphTraversal — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-callgraphtraversal.html): Navigates multi-hop caller/callee relationships Architecture documentation for the CallGraphTraversal subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ClientContext Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-clientcontext.html): Architecture documentation for the ClientContext type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [Compression — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-compression.html): Efficiently packages repositories for API submission Architecture documentation for the Compression subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ContentBlock Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-contentblock.html): Architecture documentation for the ContentBlock type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [DomainInference — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-domaininference.html): Detects subsystem ownership for specific code files Architecture documentation for the DomainInference subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DomainInfo Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-explore-function-ts-domaininfo.html): Architecture documentation for the DomainInfo type/interface in explore-function.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [Endpoint Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-endpoint.html): Architecture documentation for the Endpoint type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ErrorType Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-errortype.html): Architecture documentation for the ErrorType type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [GraphCache Class — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/class-graph-cache-ts-graphcache.html): Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [HandlerFunction Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-handlerfunction.html): Architecture documentation for the HandlerFunction type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [IdentityGeneration — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-identitygeneration.html): Hashes git commits and paths for cache keys Architecture documentation for the IdentityGeneration subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [IndexedGraph Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-graph-cache-ts-indexedgraph.html): Architecture documentation for the IndexedGraph type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [InstructionManagement — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-instructionmanagement.html): Dynamically generates LLM system prompts and tool hints Architecture documentation for the InstructionManagement subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Logging — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-logging.html): Standardizes internal debug and error reporting Architecture documentation for the Logging subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [LruManager — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-lrumanager.html): Tracks graph age and node counts for cache eviction Architecture documentation for the LruManager subdomain (part of StructuralCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/domain-mcpserver.html): The entry and execution layer implementing the Model Context Protocol to expose code analysis capabilities as AI-consumable tools. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.
- [PathIndexEntry Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-graph-cache-ts-pathindexentry.html): Architecture documentation for the PathIndexEntry type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ProgressState Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-zip-repository-ts-progressstate.html): Architecture documentation for the ProgressState type/interface in zip-repository.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [RepositoryUtilities Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/domain-repositoryutilities.html): Foundation services for interacting with local files and preparing source data for remote analysis. Architectural overview of the RepositoryUtilities domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.
- [Server Class — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/class-server-ts-server.html): Architecture documentation for the Server class in server.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ServerOptions Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-server-ts-serveroptions.html): Architecture documentation for the ServerOptions type/interface in server.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [StructuralCache Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/domain-structuralcache.html): A high-performance LRU and disk-based storage system for indexed code graphs derived from source repositories. Architectural overview of the StructuralCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [StructuredError Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-structurederror.html): Architecture documentation for the StructuredError type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [SymbolDiscovery — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-symboldiscovery.html): Implements fuzzy and exact matching for code entities Architecture documentation for the SymbolDiscovery subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ToolCallResult Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-types-ts-toolcallresult.html): Architecture documentation for the ToolCallResult type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ToolRegistration — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-toolregistration.html): Maps MCP schemas to internal handler functions Architecture documentation for the ToolRegistration subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Transport — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/subdomain-transport.html): Handles stdio communication with the client Architecture documentation for the Transport subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ZipOptions Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/mcp/type-zip-repository-ts-zipoptions.html): Architecture documentation for the ZipOptions type/interface in zip-repository.ts from the mcp codebase.
